store_headline: Music WordPress Theme for Artists and Record Labels
store_subheadline: Build your music platform with discography, artist profiles, events, and a merch store.
features: Advanced playlist manager with custom players
Elementor-based page builder with music elements
Video thumbnail generator for media showcases
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
Contact Form 7 integration for fan engagement
One-click demo import with complete music content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: Deep blue/purple neon studio lighting hero — the most contemporary music theme visual identity in the catalog
Mixing console photography that signals producer-level seriousness before a single word is read
Artist profile system built for both solo acts and label rosters — no choosing between use cases
The feature-complete alternative to Decibel with a visual identity that doesn't feel like 2015
Discography, events, artist profiles, videos, and WooCommerce merch in one Elementor-powered platform
Positioned where the studio meets the stage — equally credible for producers, bands, and labels
Slider Revolution for release campaigns and tour announcements that match the neon-cinematic aesthetic
Where Decibel wins on history, Spectacle wins on now
key_benefits: Build a music platform with a neon-studio identity no catalog theme replicates
Showcase discography, videos, and artist profiles under one cinematic design system
Start solo and add full roster management as your label grows
Sell merch through WooCommerce carrying the neon-blue studio aesthetic into the shop
Attract bookings and fans with a site as current as your music
Match Decibel's feature set while winning on visual sophistication modern artists expect
Manage releases, events, and artist content from one Elementor-powered production hub
design_features: Music-oriented layout templates with spectacular visuals
Artist profile layouts with comprehensive information
Event and tour date templates with booking integration
Custom music players and playlist displays
Dynamic content sections with animation effects

testimonials.text: Absolutely best music theme by far. Well laid out with tons of features and customisation possiblilities - 5 stars!
testimonials.author: aaronj31
